title: Oracle India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Oracle India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Oracle India in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Oracle India:
Oracle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oracle India!
